class.name: ARRaycastResult
class.brief_description: Contains the result of an AR raycast, including the hit transform and target surface.
class.description: Returned by [method ARSession.raycast]. Contains the world transform of the hit point, the type of surface hit, and an optional anchor reference. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS/macOS this type exists for API consistency but is never populated with real data.

members.member: The anchor associated with the hit result, if any.
The surface type that was hit. See [enum Target].
The alignment of the matched surface. See [enum TargetAlignment].
The hit transform in world space.

constants.constant: The hit came from existing plane geometry.
The hit came from an infinite extension of an existing plane.
The hit came from an estimated plane.
The hit surface is horizontally aligned.
The hit surface is vertically aligned.
The hit surface alignment was not restricted.
